name: I slipped and fell at work in Murray Utah last week what do I do first?
description: Report to supervisor immediately in writing, get authorized medical care, and file Form 122—delays over 180 days in Utah bar benefits[1].

mainEntity.name: I slipped and fell at work in Murray Utah last week what do I do first?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report to supervisor immediately in writing, get authorized medical care, and file Form 122—delays over 180 days in Utah bar benefits[1].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Report the injury to your supervisor immediately, ideally in writing like an email for proof.** Utah requires notice 'as soon as practicable' within 180 days to avoid losing benefits entirely[1]. Get medical treatment from an authorized provider and file Form 122 with the Utah Labor Commission. **Key factors:** Timely reporting shifts burden to employer; follow medical instructions or risk suspension; document everything. **Practical guidance:** Email your boss now detailing when/where/how it happened, seek care without delay, and track all records. Consult a workers' comp specialist if unsure. **Most claims succeed with prompt action.**
